title: aira caryophyllea var. patulipes
intro: Aira caryophyllea var. patulipes, also known as the small oat grass or caryophyllous oat grass, is a plant species belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aira caryophyllea var. patulipes include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and support respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for its medicinal uses.
